quoted_text: When the Iranian missiles and drones came for the nerve center of America’s naval operations in the Middle East, some of them hit their mark. text:
Reminder Bahrain is less than 100 km from the world's largest oil export terminal, Saudi Aramco Ras Tanura  [also a refinery] , and Qatar's Ras Laffin LNG production and export terminal.  Both of which have been hit by drones since the US attacked Iran.
